type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
We were originally asked by Crista Seaman in NPRI office to use EF of 0.3834 tonnes/mm3 for propane. 

The AEIR 2018 prescribed exactly the EF to use: 900 tonne/mm3 for liquid propane and 1008 tonne/mm3 for liquid butane.
